hypothesis: Accepted plain risk-on SPY-relative leaders may deserve more risk only when IWM 20-day return also beats SPY, because small-cap breadth confirmation separates broad risk appetite from narrow cap-weight momentum.
single_causal_variable: IWM-vs-SPY breadth confirmation inside accepted risk_on SPY-relative leader sizing
locked_variables: IWM-vs-SPY breadth confirmation inside accepted risk_on SPY-relative leader sizing

result.rejection_reason: No IWM breadth-confirmed risk-on leader variant passed fixed-window Gate 4.
